sections.content: After pressing DOWN, the left blue square moved down from rows 39-43 to rows 44-48. Now both blue squares are at the same vertical level (rows 44-48). Let me check their positions.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
for node in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue square id={node['id']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Check if level completed
print("Level completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed', False))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
